name: @creationix/rx
description: REXC encoder, decoder, and CLI data tool

scripts.build:esm: bun build rx.ts rx-cli.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm
scripts.build:cjs: bun build rx.ts --target node --format cjs --outfile dist/rx.cjs
scripts.build:shebang: printf '#!/usr/bin/env node\n' | cat - dist/rx-cli.js > dist/rx-cli.tmp && mv dist/rx-cli.tmp dist/rx-cli.js
scripts.build: bun run build:clean && bun run build:esm && bun run build:cjs && bun run build:types && bun run build:shebang
